steps.t: Water can be tested at any of the waterfalls in the Hall of Flowing Water. You should use the phial to collect samples of water in Zelem-melek.
Water can be tested in the reservoirs in passages adjacent to the Hall of Flowing Water. You should use the phial to collect samples of water in Zelem…
Other sources of water may be near the Hall of Flowing Water. You should search near the Hall of Flowing Water for more water sources to sample.
Búi is in the Hall of Flowing Water in central Zelem-melek. You should return to Búi with your findings.
